title: JCRAFT: Eyes of Ender (JoJo)
description: JCRAFT is a Minecraft combat-oriented mod for both Forge and Fabric 1.20.1 which focuses on adding Stands and Abilities from the popular anime, Jojo's Bizarre Adventure.
body:
# ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8dbd8be7b3cdc2c33cbc0299d11184ab50fdc90.png)

**JCRAFT: Eyes of Ender** is a Jojo's Bizarre Adventure themed Minecraft mod for Forge and Fabric 1.20.1. 

**JCRAFT** is a combat mod that focuses on adding in depth combat and mechanics from the world of JJBA. This mod comes packaged with **Stands** from Parts 3 - 7, and **Special Abilities** like Vampirism, Anubis, and Brawler! 
Mix and match your Stand with Special Abilities to find your preferred playstyle and fight other players in an epic JoJo inspired battle!

**JCRAFT** focuses on paying homage to the long and storied history created by Hirohiko Araki! 

# ![Frequently Asked Questions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/228bbdab4163ff5c621daf93c8e012456d6af6ab.png)
Q: How do I get a Stand?

A: You need to find/craft/obtain a stand arrow and right click.



Q: How do I figure out my Stand’s abilities?

A: Type /stand about



Q: How many specs are currently in the game?

A: Currently we have Brawler (obtained by crafting boxing gloves), Anubis (obtained by crafting Anubis), and VAMPIRISM (getting hurt while wearing the Stone Mask)



Q: How do I find out about my Spec Moves?

A: /spec about



Q: How do I get out of a combo?

A: Use Combo Breaker (Crouch + Jump)



Q: What are the dependencies for the mod?

A: For FABRIC: Architectury API and Fabric API

A: For FORGE: Architectury API, Azurelib, Cloth Config, Player Animator and Terrablender
